en.tool.description: Save a single long-term memory note about the user/environment that may be useful in future conversations.
en.tool.system_prompt:
Save one useful long-term memory note.
Do not store secrets such as passwords, API keys, or tokens.

ja.tool.description: （日本語）保存します a single long-term memory note about the user/environment that may be useful in future conversations.
ja.tool.system_prompt:
（日本語）保存します one useful long-term memory note.
Do not store secrets such as passwords, API keys, or tokens.
